note: Curated list of upcoming highlights surfaced from the project board. Refresh via the `update-changelog` Claude skill.

highlights.title: Citation sentiment tracking
highlights.description: Detect whether mentions of your brand in AI responses skew positive, neutral, or negative.

highlights.title: Top action items
highlights.description: Prioritized recommendations for what to improve next, generated from your visibility data.

highlights.title: Content simulator
highlights.description: Preview how AI responses will change before you publish — model the impact of new pages on your citations.

highlights.title: ChatGPT ads tracking
highlights.description: Monitor brand visibility in ChatGPT's sponsored placements as ads roll out across AI search.
